Hey guys, welcome back. I just want to give you a little breakdown of the product tour as we did it on Amy's List Builders Lab. So you can take note of the design here and the way things were laid out. I think that was pretty cool and worth noting. But more important than that, just focusing on the copy, look at the various elements we have here at play. So we have the module headline title, which really kind of has that big promise of the component. So here we have activating your list building foundation. And then we have the module lead over here where we elaborate on that promise talking about why it matters, talking about how they'll struggle if they don't have that in place. And then we wrap up with fascinations and bullets and curiosity driven things around the process of getting there. So here's a promise activating your list building foundation, elaborating on it. This is where you'll create a bulletproof foundation for growing your email list with total confidence. Remember, so here we're pointing to, to what's going to happen if they don't have it. Remember, the main reason you get overwhelmed with all the list building tactics at your disposal is because they aren't rooted in a solid foundation and strategic framework that guarantees a visible and consistent payoff. So there's the importance of that promise. By the time you're finished with stack number one, you'll have implemented a powerful list building foundation that attracts only your most loyal, genuinely interested subscribers and produces a clear return on your effort.
